meta.title: City Hub — Strategic F&B Management & Franchise
meta.description: City Hub is a fully integrated F&B ecosystem — consulting, operations, and franchise solutions. From the idea to the operation.
meta.brandTagline: From the idea to the operation

hero.lead: City Hub — Strategic management system and professional consulting solutions for the F&B sector.
hero.subline: From the idea to the operation.

about.title: More than a developer. A full F&B ecosystem.
paragraphs: City Hub is more than a developer or operator — it's a fully integrated ecosystem for the F&B sector.
We provide integrated consulting services and solutions that connect marketing, operations, and financial management under one umbrella.
From building strong concepts to operating successful brands and developing high-potential locations — we create structured systems that scale.

services.title: Integrated consulting solutions for F&B businesses
services.subtitle: All under one system.

items.title: Marketing consulting
items.description: Brand positioning, campaign design, and performance marketing built for F&B growth.

items.title: Operational systems & SOPs
items.description: Standardized operating procedures that turn single outlets into repeatable, scalable systems.

items.title: Financial & cost management
items.description: Cost controls, pricing strategy, and financial monitoring to protect your margins.

items.title: Brand development
items.description: From concept to identity — we design brands engineered to be operated and franchised.

items.title: Expansion & franchise strategy
items.description: Franchise-ready models, territorial planning, and partner onboarding across MENA and Africa.

jinzo.name: Jinzo
jinzo.blurb: Bold, loud, and unmistakably Mexican — a street-food concept built for speed and scale.

shakencake.name: Shake N Cake
shakencake.blurb: An over-the-top milkshake experience with desserts and savory shareables — instantly Instagrammable.

ktown.name: K-Town
ktown.blurb: Korean street food, bold flavors, and a young energetic identity that travels.

haret.name: Haret Elyasmeen
haret.blurb: Authentic Palestinian heritage served with warmth — full-experience dining.

stravo.name: Stravo
stravo.blurb: Italian street food made fast and fun without losing the soul of the cuisine.

tokyotreats.name: Tokyo Treats
tokyotreats.blurb: Japanese-inspired desserts with a playful modern twist — a destination concept.

why.title: We don't just build brands — we build systems designed to perform.

items.title: Manufacturing integration
items.description: Central production and supply that protects quality and unit economics.

items.title: Operational excellence
items.description: Training, SOPs, and playbooks that keep every outlet on brand.

items.title: Marketing & growth
items.description: In-house marketing strategy and execution designed for F&B conversion.

items.title: Financial control
items.description: Cost optimization, pricing, and live financial monitoring.

items.title: Prime locations
items.description: Mall development and location sourcing through our real-estate network.

items.title: Franchise-ready models
items.description: Systems, documentation, and support built to scale from day one.

process.title: From request to launch — 6 structured steps

steps.title: Submit your request
steps.description: Share your city, budget, and preferred brand. We review within 48 hours.

steps.title: Discovery meeting
steps.description: We align on your goals, experience, and investment readiness.

steps.title: Business alignment
steps.description: We match you with the brand that fits your market, budget, and ambitions.

steps.title: Location & development
steps.description: We help source, assess, and build out your location end-to-end.

steps.title: Training & operation
steps.description: Team training, SOP rollout, and a supervised soft-launch period.

steps.title: Launch
steps.description: Full marketing launch, opening support, and continuous performance monitoring.

investment.title: Whether you're launching your first concept or expanding your portfolio — City Hub provides the system, consulting, and structure you need to grow.

support.title: Your business is backed by a full support team

items.title: Continuous consulting
items.description: Advisory across growth, operations, and strategy.

items.title: Operational support
items.description: On-the-ground ops coverage whenever you need it.

items.title: Financial monitoring
items.description: Dashboards and controls to protect margin.

items.title: Performance optimization
items.description: Continuous improvement based on real store data.

vision.title: The most effective and sustainable F&B management solutions in Egypt, the Middle East, and Africa.
